title: POKER
summary: Heads-up five-card draw vs JOSHUA. Fixed limit: ante 5, bet 10, no raises. Felt the machine to win.
input_syntax: DEAL | BET | CHECK | CALL | FOLD | DRAW <pos 1-5, up to 3> | STAND PAT
notes: Two betting rounds (player acts first), draw of up to 3 cards. Deck shuffled by a MINSTD LCG seeded from hand number + chip counts; undealt deck rides in STATE so draws are deterministic. W.O.P.R. plays a fixed doctrine: opens jacks-or-better, calls any pair, pat on straight+, keeps pairs on the draw. MOVE always requires INPUT (players=1; W.O.P.R. answers within the same frame).
author: core
